nasb.text: Your offering shall be reckoned to you as the grain from the threshing floor or the full produce from the wine vat.

esv.text: And your contribution shall be counted to you as though it were the grain of the threshing floor, and as the fullness of the winepress.

cnv.text: 這要算為你們的舉祭，好像禾場上的五穀，又像榨酒池中滿滿的酒。

ccb.text: 这就算作你们献上了麦场的五谷和榨酒池的酒。
